positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical Neo-Art Nouveau illustration of a whimsical cosmic forest spirit (a graceful cervine/deer hybrid), nestled among bioluminescent mushrooms and trailing nebula vines. The composition must be perfectly centered, isolated on a plain background, and suitable for textile printing. Emphasize intricate linework, symmetrical elements, and strong silhouettes. Color palette: Deep indigo, cosmic teal, sage green, and accents of brilliant gold foil and metallic yellow. Style: Vector graphic quality, tattoo flash aesthetic, maximalist detailing, clean cutouts, print-ready illustration.
negative: blurry, text, watermark, signature, low quality, noise, artifact, extra limbs, bad anatomy, ugly, disfigured, cropped, tiling, multiple subjects, messy background
